style_note: Tile Africa's own name for the UI placeholder 'Eclectic' - bold mix-and-match: mixed metal finishes (chrome/black/brushed gold), patterned tiles, slate, black and coral statement pieces.
known_gaps: Tile Africa's Eclectic Mix bathroom sub-listing is tiny (7 products: Croydex accessories, one vanity, one hand shower). Everything else here was style-matched from their wider catalogue on 2026-07-10 (mixed finishes, patterned/slate tiles, black + brushed gold accents) - same approach as Modern Metro's wall tiles. Prices are real and current; the style pairing is our curation, not Tile Africa's tagging.
Built-in baths come from the general built-in baths category - Tile Africa does not tag any built-in bath to a style collection.
From the style's own listing: the Nuvo Maravilla Black 600mm vanity (budget tier) and the Croydex One Function Handset (budget shower head).
